basicDetails.schemeName: All Goa One-Act Play Competition in Konkani

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to attract youth towards dramatic activities and promote Goan culture through Konkani theatre. It provides cash awards, mementos, and certificates for best One-Act Play performances along with individual category awards for youth, clubs, and associations.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "All Goa One-Act Play Competition in Konkani" was launched by the Tiatr Academy under the Art, Culture and Museums Department, Government of Goa. The scheme aims to attract youth towards dramatic activities and provide ample opportunities to showcase their talents in dramatics while promoting Goan culture through Konkani theatre. The scheme provides cash awards for the top 3 performances along with mementos and certificates, individual awards for various categories like direction, acting, music, and stage setting, and reimbursement of transport costs as per Regional Transport Office norms. The applicant must be an individual, club, or association capable of presenting a One-Act Play in Konkani with duration between 35 to 45 minutes, and must submit a typed copy of the play in Roman script along with written permission from the playwright. The scheme is implemented by Tiatr Academy of Goa. The applications for this scheme are accepted offline.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - Cash awards for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd best performances (amount as decided by Tiatr Academy of Goa). - Mementos and certificates for top 3 performances. - Individual awards with mementos (no cash) for Direction, Male Actor, Female Actor, Background Music, Stage Setting, Light Effects, Make-up, and Script. - Reimbursement of transport expenses as per Regional Transport Office norms. - Video recording of all plays for preservation in Tiatr Academy of Goa Library. _*Performance must not contain adverse remarks against any governments, individuals, institutions, or anything against caste, creed, and religion._ _*Participants must abide by all competition rules and regulations._ _*Any violation may result in disqualification and forfeiture of benefits._

children.text: The scheme "All Goa One-Act Play Competition in Konkani" was launched by the Tiatr Academy under the Art, Culture and Museums Department, Government of Goa. The scheme aims to attract youth towards dramatic activities and provide ample opportunities to showcase their talents in dramatics while promoting Goan culture through Konkani theatre. The scheme provides cash awards for the top 3 performances along with mementos and certificates, individual awards for various categories like direction, acting, music, and stage setting, and reimbursement of transport costs as per Regional Transport Office norms. The applicant must be an individual, club, or association capable of presenting a One-Act Play in Konkani with duration between 35 to 45 minutes, and must submit a typed copy of the play in Roman script along with written permission from the playwright. The scheme is implemented by Tiatr Academy of Goa. The applications for this scheme are accepted offline.
Cash awards for 1st, 2nd, and 3rd best performances (amount as decided by Tiatr Academy of Goa).
Mementos and certificates for top 3 performances.
Individual awards with mementos (no cash) for Direction, Male Actor, Female Actor, Background Music, Stage Setting, Light Effects, Make-up, and Script.
Reimbursement of transport expenses as per Regional Transport Office norms.
Video recording of all plays for preservation in Tiatr Academy of Goa Library.
*Performance must not contain adverse remarks against any governments, individuals, institutions, or anything against caste, creed, and religion.
*Participants must abide by all competition rules and regulations.
*Any violation may result in disqualification and forfeiture of benefits.
Step 1:
The interested applicant should take a printout of the
prescribed format
of the application form.
Step 2:
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required). Sign the application form and mention the date.
Step 3:
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to -
Tiatr Academy of Goa, AS-1 / AS-4, Block A, 2nd Floor, Campal Trade Centre, Opposite Kala Academy, Campal, Panaji, Goa, India – 403001
*Applicants are advised to save a copy of the submitted application form and any acknowledgment.
*Applications are considered on a "First come First Serve" basis, subject to the availability of funds.
*Performance date and time will be determined by draw of lots.
*If applicant withdraws after schedule is drawn, full security deposit will be forfeited.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The interested applicant should take a printout of the [prescribed format](https://www.goa.gov.in/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/Citizen-Charter-TAG.pdf) of the application form. **Step 2:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields, attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required). Sign the application form and mention the date. **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to - ***Tiatr Academy of Goa, AS-1 / AS-4, Block A, 2nd Floor, Campal Trade Centre, Opposite Kala Academy, Campal, Panaji, Goa, India – 403001*** _*Applicants are advised to save a copy of the submitted application form and any acknowledgment._ _*Applications are considered on a "First come First Serve" basis, subject to the availability of funds._ _*Performance date and time will be determined by draw of lots._ _*If applicant withdraws after schedule is drawn, full security deposit will be forfeited._

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant must be an individual, club, or association. - The applicant must present a One-Act Play in Konkani language. - The applicant must ensure the play duration is not less than 35 minutes and not more than 45 minutes. - The applicant must ensure participation only when at least 5 groups are participating in the competition.

children.text: The applicant must be an individual, club, or association.
The applicant must present a One-Act Play in Konkani language.
The applicant must ensure the play duration is not less than 35 minutes and not more than 45 minutes.
The applicant must ensure participation only when at least 5 groups are participating in the competition.
